name: Hirize Public API
description: Hirize AI-powered HR API for resume parsing, job description parsing, AI candidate-job matching, candidate intelligence (HirizeIQ), and employee retention analysis (RetainMe). Supports PDF, JPG, PNG formats with OCR capabilities. Async requests with webhook support available.
